apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Inleads AI API Key. You can find your API Key in your inleads.ai settings.

identify.title: Identify
identify.description: Send identify calls to Inleads AI.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The External ID of the user

first_name.label: First name
first_name.description: The user's first name. This field is mandatory if you're not providing a name field

last_name.label: Last name
last_name.description: The user's last name. This field is mandatory if you're not providing a name field

account_id.label: Account id
account_id.description: The account id, to uniquely identify the account associated with the user

created_at.label: Created at
created_at.description: The timestamp when the user was created, represented in the ISO-8601 date format. For instance, "2023-09-26T15:30:00Z".

traits.label: Traits
traits.description: Properties to associate with the user

userMeta.label: User Metadata
userMeta.description: User metadata including IP, Location, etc.

latitude.label: Latitude
latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the user's location.

longitude.label: Longitude
longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the user's location.

country.label: Country
country.description: The country of the user's location.

city.label: City
city.description: The city of the user's location.

osVersion.label: OS Version
osVersion.description: The version of the user's operating system.

deviceType.label: Device Type
deviceType.description: The type of device the user is using.

deviceVendor.label: Device Vendor
deviceVendor.description: The vendor or manufacturer of the user's device.

deviceModel.label: Device Model
deviceModel.description: The model of the user's device.

timeZone.label: Time Zone
timeZone.description: The time zone of the user's location.

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred.

referer.label: Referrer
referer.description: The referrer of the page where the event occurred.

utc_time.label: UTC Time
utc_time.description: The time of the event in UTC.

source_ip.label: IP Address
source_ip.description: The IP address of the user.
